mentions.note: Up $10 today on Snowflake momentum shift; other stocks shining brighter recently. Cramer retains faith in CEO Alex Karp; insider selling concern noted by caller but dismissed as temporary eclipse.
Down 20% YTD; fundamentally amazing company but stock got ahead of itself; let it run if playing with house money; long-term conviction intact despite valuation concerns.
AI applications layer company (data analytics). Cramer notes market sentiment has shifted negative on stock despite strong fundamentals; part of applications expansion.
Software stock facing market headwind. Cramer mentions market hates software including Palantir.
Market has lost taste for expensive software but Palantir is one-of-a-kind consulting firm with strong book of business; own it, don't trade it.
